text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look who's got her nose in a book. 
Whatcha reading, Big Mack?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl Athletics through Physics. I thought it might prove useful to my training.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah, Upon Achilles Shield Lies a Kebab, eh… A great mystery novel if I say so myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
To think the kebab stand owner would be 
the culprit… I had the Turkish ice cream 
salesman pegged for the villain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, the book I'm reading is called Horsegirl Athletics through Physics. It's—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, Under the Overpass at Three in the Morning, right? Yeah, that's one heck of an anthem. Really speaks to the problems with society.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Really makes you think… Is the world corrupt, 
or is it just me? Deep stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, like I said, it's called Horsegirl Athletics through Physics!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: A Modern Relic: Java Man, huh? Yeah, old-fashioned values just don't cut it in the modern era, do they… That essay really gets to the core of the issue.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that does it!! Are you trying 
to have a conversation or not?!
